issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for OCR failures or missing language data.

scenarios.name: Extract text from a noisy scanned receipt
scenarios.rationale: Treatment preprocesses with cv2 grayscale + fastNlMeansDenoising + adaptiveThreshold, deskews, scales up below 1000px, and runs image_to_string with --psm 4/6; baseline typically does only basic grayscale+threshold and skips PSM tuning.

scenarios.name: OCR a single-line serial number with restricted character set
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines --psm 7 with -c tessedit_char_whitelist=0123456789ABCDEF in the config string as the skill prescribes; baseline rarely pairs PSM 7 with a tessedit_char_whitelist and leaves PSM at the default.
